payload.claim_text: we've ended the sale of MetroCards

payload.claim_text: Since the start of the new year, over 45,000 transactions have been made at our CSCs. $543,000 has been transferred from MetroCards over to OMNY. Over 8,300 seniors have come to CSCs to enroll in the Reduced-Fare program.
